title: pelargonium × peytoniae
intro: Pelargonium × peytoniae, also known as the Cape Geranium or Peyton's Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × peytoniae include its ability to relieve digestive issues, soothe sore throats, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Pelargonium × peytoniae can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
